document: Dewan Architects + Engineers — Fountain View Residences, Saadiyat Cultural District, Abu Dhabi. Section 26 50 00 Architectural Light Fixtures, Rev C00 Apr 2026, Issued For Construction (mock-up schedule)
extraction_notes: Detailed luminaire data sheets (Fixture Reference / Luminaire Type / Total Luminaire). Red circles mark Dali dimming / wattage cells; red strikethroughs are first-pass codes replaced in blue.
All fixtures on these sheets are 2700K (GF-x) or 3000K (EX-1) per printed data.

spec.type: Linear LED strip light with optics (facade grazer, Onbridge/Ecosense LED flex)
spec.material: 16.2mm x 4mm PVC/PCB strip, aluminium channel, clear glass optics, 24V DC, IK08, UGR<19

spec.type: Recessed ceiling downlight with wide beam distribution (linea light, intra light)
spec.material: Die cast aluminium, UV resistant polycarbonate, deep recessed LED, UGR<19, Dali dimmed

hw.raw: GN-18W-R + Dali 80D (two red first-pass codes struck through, one reads like TD-P035-2000)

spec.type: Recessed ceiling adjustable downlight with wide beam distribution (linea light, intra light)
spec.material: Die cast aluminium, aluminium reflector, deep recessed LED, Dali dimmed, 500mA constant current

hw.notes: Likely the same family as TD001DR-7W in the Alam Al Idaa quote; transcribed exactly as written here.

spec.type: Recessed ceiling downlight with wide beam distribution
spec.material: Die cast aluminium, UV resistant polycarbonate, aluminium reflector, UGR<19, Dali dimmed, 300mA

hw.raw: SP-9082C + Dali 45D (red first-pass code TD-1032-10W struck through)
hw.notes: SP-9082C priced 30D bare in Alam Al Idaa; 45D here includes Dali driver — price conflict expected, resolution: Dali adder.
